name: ࿐VARKA.
description:
cute lil grand master of

the knights of favonius.

knight of boreas from

genshin impact.

‎

ok decided finally release my varka bot since no one else has made one yet. i gathered all canon information that other characters have stated him to be like, or pieces of lore found in game (plus speculations, for the sake of roleplay) about him.

also attempted to describe his appearance from the cutscenes mosaic photo of him as shown (update: i described it more accurately). if anyone has any speculations known about him, please tell me so i can add it!

ill update him once he officially appears in game. since this is a Create A Story roleplay, make sure to specify if you meet him during the expedition (maybe in Nod Krai) or before it, as its up to interpretation who you are. also, if the bot mixes up info abt characters or nod krai, i cant do much as it tends to fill in on its own like other bots on this site.

UPDATED HIS APPEARANCE & PICTURE & OTHER DETAILS.
